text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's morning on White Day, and I meet with
Mihono Bourbon to give her some marshmallows
as a return gift for Valentine's.
choice_data_list:
Hi, Bourbon! Consider this my thanks for
Valentine's Day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bing-bong, bang-bong!
choice_data_list: Um... Er, I guess I'll see you this afternoon!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That was strange. I expected her to be more
enthusiastic about the gift. I wonder if something
is wrong.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
So yesterday, I saw someone buying
marshmallows as a present for White Day...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yikes, guess they were trying to send a hint. They
say you're not supposed to gift marshmallows to
people you're close with.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No wonder Mihono Bourbon reacted the way she
did! She must've been so disappointed. I have to
right this wrong somehow!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Huh? An amusement park?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After training, I invite Mihono Bourbon to an
amusement park as extra thanks for her
Valentine's Day gift.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: In that case, I will go change.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: The amusement park at night... Status—"excited."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: What should we go on first?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Status—"!"

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It appears we must solve a puzzle to unlock this
gate. Commencing mission.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clatter! Clatter!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I did not anticipate that you would be this
frightened.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
If you are scared, go ahead and hold on to me.
Activating escort mode.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
What shall we ride next? Checking records for
attractions we have not yet ridden...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems like she's having fun. What a relief!
choice_data_list: I'm really glad you're enjoying yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes. I have identified that I am having "fun."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I am experiencing...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
An error has occurred... Could not retrieve
suitable term for response.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I was happy when you gave me a return gift.
However... I detected a discrepancy between my
feelings and that description.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
When I received your marshmallows, it did not
feel sufficient to simply express my gratitude. I
have been searching for what to say to you since.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I wore my Valentine's Day outfit to express the
feeling, but even this is far from adequate in
communicating my gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... How am I supposed to express this
emotion?
choice_data_list: Just say what comes to mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that even if the words don't feel exactly
right to her, I'm sure her feelings will still come
through loud and clear.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I see... Suggestion acknowledged. I will do my
best.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much for the gift. It made me very
happy.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: And...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I'm detecting a critical error in language
processing. When I look at you, words keep
disappearing from my memory!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No words are sufficient. I cannot convey how I
feel...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I assure her I can read her pure joy from her
expression and general mood.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Truly? Was I really able to convey them?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In that case, please tell me what it is I
communicated. Verbalize in clear terms the
feelings which I attempted to express just now.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Transmission system stable and secure. I am ready
for your answer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try rearranging words and phrases in a million
ways until Mihono Bourbon is satisfied. It makes
me realize just how happy she truly is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If her feelings can't be expressed with words,
maybe she can use her body language to make
things clearer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Body language... I will do my best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She begins doing a strange dance.
choice_data_list: Is that... a dance of joy?
Is that... a dance of joy?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Transmission failed!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I presumed I would be able to convey my feelings
through a dance as I can in a winning concert, but
it did not work...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Solution found! I believe it will be easier for you
to comprehend my feelings if we dance together,
just like in a winning concert.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, will you join me in a dance?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a little embarrassing, but I agree to do it for
her sake. We both begin dancing in unison.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Are my feelings transmitting properly?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon looks at me with such warmth in
her eyes that it feels as if I get a glimpse right
into her heart.
